example: Hoy es un día festivo en España.
exampleTranslation: Today is a holiday in Spain.

example: Descanso durante el fin de semana.
exampleTranslation: I rest during the weekend.
We are in the twenty-first century.

example: La primavera es mi estación favorita.
exampleTranslation: Spring is my favorite season.
Flowers bloom in spring.
It is hot in the summer.
Leaves fall in autumn.
It snows a lot in winter.

example: Es la una y media de la tarde.
exampleTranslation: It is 1:30 in the afternoon.

example: Son las dos y cuarto en punto.
exampleTranslation: It is 2:15 sharp.

example: La película empieza a las tres menos cuarto.
exampleTranslation: The movie starts at quarter to three.
We eat lunch at noon.

example: La fiesta termina a la medianoche.
exampleTranslation: The party ends at midnight.
I am cold, I need a jacket.

example: Los niños tienen calor en la playa.
exampleTranslation: The children are hot on the beach.

example: Tengo mucha sed después de correr.
exampleTranslation: I am very thirsty after running.

example: Ella tiene sueño porque es tarde.
exampleTranslation: She is sleepy because it is late.

I can't talk, I'm in a hurry.

example: Tú tienes razón en este asunto.
exampleTranslation: You are right about this matter.
How lucky you are! You won the prize.
I feel like eating ice cream.

example: Tengo que estudiar para el examen.
exampleTranslation: I have to study for the exam.

example: Hoy hace buen tiempo en el parque.
exampleTranslation: Today it is good weather in the park.

example: Hace mal tiempo, mejor nos quedamos.
exampleTranslation: It is bad weather, we better stay.

It rains a lot in the north.

example: Nieva en las montañas en invierno.
exampleTranslation: It snows in the mountains in winter.

example: Conozco a María desde hace años.
exampleTranslation: I have known María for years.

example: El comerciante cierra la tienda a las ocho.
exampleTranslation: The shopkeeper closes the shop at eight.

example: No encuentro mis llaves de casa.
exampleTranslation: I can't find my house keys.

example: Vuelvo a casa a las seis de la tarde.
exampleTranslation: I return home at six in the evening.
Can you help me with this?

example: Pido una ensalada de la carta.
exampleTranslation: I order a salad from the menu.

example: El camarero sirve la comida caliente.
exampleTranslation: The waiter serves hot food.

example: Pongo los libros sobre la mesa.
exampleTranslation: I put the books on the table.

example: Salgo con mis amigos esta noche.
exampleTranslation: I am going out with my friends tonight.

example: Traigo el postre para la cena.
exampleTranslation: I bring dessert for dinner.

example: Hago la tarea antes de cenar.
exampleTranslation: I do homework before eating dinner.

example: Me caigo si no tengo cuidado.
exampleTranslation: I fall if I am not careful.
I am speaking on the phone now.

example: Ellos están comiendo en el comedor.
exampleTranslation: They are eating in the dining room.
She is writing a report.

example: Compro el libro y lo leo.
exampleTranslation: I buy the book and read it.

example: Veo las fotos y las guardo.
exampleTranslation: I see the photos and save them.

We solve the problem easily.
